description: Perseuss provides logistics optimization software focused on cartonization, palletization, and freight packing efficiency for warehouses and shippers. Its site describes parcel and cold-chain packing optimization and related integrations.
summary: getperseuss.com exposes a public Wix Site MCP endpoint at `https://www.getperseuss.com/_api/mcp`; its cartonization API docs on the site point to a different domain, so no getperseuss.com-hosted HTTP/GraphQL/CLI surfaces were recorded.
